content: w3champions has an open-source identification-service on GitHub that authenticates users via Blizzard Battle.net OAuth. The service issues JWTs and returns a W3CUserAuthenticationDto with BattleTag and IsAdmin flag. w3champions does NOT expose a public OAuth endpoint for third parties; authentication flow for this project is: Battle.net OAuth -> get BattleTag -> query w3champions stats API using BattleTag. The w3champions API (api.w3champions.com) is publicly accessible (used by open-source frontend) but has no official third-party documentation.
